subcodes.first_line: O Bashír-i-Ilahí! Thy letter was like unto a treasury of poems in glorification and praise of the Blessed Beauty. It hath imparted the utmost joy and gladness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیرالهی نامه تو چون دیوان محامد و نعوت جمال مبارک بود نهایت فرح و سرور
subcodes.subjects: @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah, @music and singing, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
